name: Ping Delay
explanation: A stereo ping-pong / multi-tap delay. The wet signal cross-feeds between the left and right channels so every repeat bounces to the opposite side, while a chain of extra rhythmic taps thickens the pattern. A tone low-pass darkens each repeat, a width control spreads the bounce, and a saturated feedback path keeps near-max feedback ringing but bounded. Controls: Time, Feedback, Taps, Tone, Width and dry/wet Mix.
